usage_rules.primary_action: Use brand.primary (#14532D) for main CTAs (Create Quote, Save).
usage_rules.secondary_action: Use brand.secondary (#F97316) for alerts, 'Draft' states, or 'Workshop' highlights.
usage_rules.backgrounds: Avoid pure white #FFFFFF for main background. Use #F8FAFC (Slate-50) to make white cards pop.
usage_rules.text: Never use pure black. Use #0F172A (Slate-900) for headers, #334155 (Slate-700) for body.

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm font-medium transition-all shadow-sm active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm font-medium transition-all shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm transition-all

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-sm border shadow-sm p-6 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors
cards.stat_card: bg-card p-6 rounded-sm border shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between h-32

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

login_background.description: Workbench with tools in a rustic workshop - Use for Login Page Background or Hero

texture_wood.description: Chisel on wood chips - Use for sidebar texture or project headers

project_placeholder_1.description: Person holding brown wooden table - Use for 'Active Projects' placeholder

invoice_placeholder_1.description: Person holding white paper - Use for 'New Invoice' or 'Documents' section

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react', 'recharts' (for dashboard stats), 'date-fns' (for German date formatting).
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all H1-H3 headings. Import from Google Fonts.
Use 'Manrope' for all body text. Import from Google Fonts.
Implement a 'Bento Grid' layout for the Dashboard (Route: /dashboard).
For the 'Angebot' (Quote) and 'Rechnung' (Invoice) pages, use a 'Paper UI' metaphor: A white container with 'shadow-floating' centered on a gray background, resembling a physical A4 sheet.
Ensure 'MwSt' (VAT) logic is prominent in the UI (Toggle: 19% / 0% Kleinunternehmer).
Use 'data-testid' on all buttons and inputs (e.g., 'btn-create-invoice', 'input-client-name').
Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use gradients for buttons. Flat, solid colors signify 'Handwerk' honesty.
Use the provided image URLs for the Login page background and Dashboard placeholders.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
